name: After All These Years I'm Losing My Edge!!!

issues.description: PowerBoost target is 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' but text specifies 'Up to 1' which allows choosing zero cards. Target should use 'optional' modifier or explicit 'UpTo:1' constraint.
Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. Text retrieves from trash, not deck. Should be a custom trash-retrieval action or 'PlayFromHand' after search. Correct action: retrieve from trash to hand.
Missing conditional: second action should only trigger 'if you have 10 or more cards in your trash'. Requires condition: 'TrashCount>=10'.
Filter is incomplete. Specifies 'ByCost' but missing color filter. Text requires 'black Character card' — filter must include color:'black' and cardType:'Character'.
